TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sadipongan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 114 buwan, 254 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 97 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 157 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 36%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sadipongan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sadipongan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sadipongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sadipongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sadipongan hya' ga Tapowaray. tay mkyahu' na Sadipongan hya' ga Makrahay. rekisi kayal kyokay alang Sadipongan ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕa*ipoŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa tapowaraj. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa makraħaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj alaŋ s~ɕa*ipoŋan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sadipongan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 114 buwan, 254 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 97 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 157 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 36%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sadipongan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sadipongan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sadipongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sadipongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sadipongan hya' ga Tapowaray. tay mkyahu' na Sadipongan hya' ga Makrahay. rekisi kayal kyokay alang Sadipongan ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕa*ipoŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa tapowaraj. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*ipoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa makraħaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj alaŋ s~ɕa*ipoŋan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
